title: Israel Closes Al Aqsa Mosque at Ramadan, Citing Wartime Safety Concerns
summary_full: The temporary measure, during the holy Muslim fasting month, follows tensions as Jewish activists increasingly encroach on the contested religious site.
summary_public: The temporary measure, during the holy Muslim fasting month, follows tensions as Jewish activists increasingly encroach on the contested religious site.
